predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person.

predicates.name: served_as_principal_family_dwelling_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The asset served as the family's principal dwelling when the estate of the person opened.

predicates.name: is_household_effect
predicates.description: The asset is household furniture or a household effect.

predicates.name: present_in_dwelling_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The first asset was present in the second asset as dwelling when the estate of the person opened.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_return_right
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal return.

predicates.name: obtains_usufruct_over
predicates.description: The person obtains usufruct over the asset as a legal right.
